Right side: a large green upward arrow with '+8%' and a stock chart icon on a dark green background. Center dividing line is bright white. Bold Korean text overlay '유가 vs 증시' at the top. Clean, modern design with high contrast colors. Bright and vivid color palette, 16:9 aspect ratio.
text_overlay:

이번 주 무슨 일이?
